heading: Prohibition
label: 5028a Prohibition
text: The Director may not reduce the activities, projects, or volunteers funded under the other parts of this subchapter in order to support projects under this part.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1993 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1993section 392 of Pub. L. 103–82section 4951 of this title
